agents.label: CEO
agents.desc: Reads instructions, formulates the Master Plan, delegates to C-Suite, and finally condenses all outputs into the Final Executive Report.

agents.label: CPO
agents.desc: Designs the core product architecture and operational logistics based on the CEO's Master Plan.

agents.label: CFO
agents.desc: Creates the brutal financial constraint model and pricing matrices to ensure high gross margins.

agents.label: CMO
agents.desc: Formulates the Go-To-Market and elite brand strategy tailored for target demographics.

agents.label: COO
agents.desc: Maps out the full operational execution framework to deliver the promised services.

agents.label: CIO
agents.desc: Defines the technical infrastructure and software stack required by the CPO's architecture.

agents.label: Auditor
agents.desc: Aggressively stress-tests the CFO's financial model to identify fraudulent or optimistic assumptions.

agents.label: CLO
agents.desc: Reviews the business model and financials for fatal legal and compliance risks.

agents.label: Market Analyst
agents.desc: Analyzes the GTM Strategy against market realities to determine viability.

agents.label: Competitor Sim
agents.desc: Simulates a ruthless competitor attempting to destroy the CMO's GTM Strategy.

agents.label: Target Buyer
agents.desc: Acts as the target demographic, evaluating the CMO's strategy for maximum appeal.

agents.label: Unaware Audience
agents.desc: Evaluates branding from the perspective of a cold, completely unaware layperson.

agents.label: Chief of Staff
agents.desc: Translates the COO's framework into a tight executive coordination schedule.

agents.label: CISO
agents.desc: Identifies security vulnerabilities and privacy loopholes in the operational layout.

agents.label: The Fixer
agents.desc: Identifies operational crisis points and formulates brutal resolutions to save the company.

agents.label: The Whisperer
agents.desc: Reviews the operational framework for intelligence vulnerabilities and operational security.
